hero.subtitle: Velocewealth turns your vehicle from a sunk cost into managed wealth. Cost per km, certified service log, resale index — at a glance.

howItWorks.title: Three steps to take back control
howItWorks.subtitle: From signup to your first cost per km — five minutes.
howItWorks.step1Description: Make, model, mileage. Velocewealth identifies your powertrain and starts tracking.
howItWorks.step2Description: Snap fuel receipts or charge invoices. Our OCR reads, classifies, and computes everything.
howItWorks.step3Description: Real-time cost per km, predictive alerts, resale index. No more surprises.

features.title: Everything you need to take back control
features.subtitle: Six modules built to turn complexity into clarity.
features.ocrDescription: Photograph fuel receipts, charging invoices — Velocewealth reads, classifies, and computes everything for you.
features.logDescription: An immutable maintenance history, cryptographically signed, exportable to PDF to reassure future buyers.
features.resaleDescription: Track your vehicle's value like an asset. Anticipate depreciation, sell at the right time.
features.mapDescription: Cheapest stations, available chargers, partner garages — all on one ad-free map.
features.ecoDescription: Measure your impact, earn badges, unlock partner discounts.
features.predictDescription: No more bad surprises: our algorithms anticipate real wear and warn you at the right time.

testimonials.title: They're already driving with Velocewealth
testimonials.subtitle: From individual drivers to small fleet managers.
testimonials.t1Quote: I just learned my car costs me €0.28/km. That's more than an Uber for short trips — I changed my routine.
testimonials.t2Quote: The certified log earned me €1,200 extra at resale. The buyer didn't ask a single question.
testimonials.t3Quote: Tracking 4 company vehicles without Excel — finally possible.

faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.a1: Never. Our revenue comes exclusively from Premium subscriptions and partner-garage commissions. No advertising cookies, no third-party tracking. Your data is stored in the European Union (Supabase).
faq.q2: Is the certified log legally binding?
faq.a2: The certified log guarantees technical integrity: each entry is signed with a SHA-256 hash chained to the previous one, and any modification is blocked at the database level. It is not a notarized document but it is solid technical proof to reassure a future buyer.
faq.a3: Yes. No commitment, no penalty. Cancel from Settings → Subscription with one click via the Stripe portal.
faq.q4: Does the app work outside Europe?
faq.a4: Yes. Velocewealth is available in France, Belgium, Switzerland, Morocco, Senegal, Ivory Coast, Canada and the United States at launch. Multi-currency tracking is built in.
faq.q5: Is my electric vehicle properly tracked?
faq.a5: Yes. Velocewealth handles ICE, electric, and hybrid powertrains. The energy mix is computed automatically, and savings vs 100% ICE are highlighted.
faq.q6: What's the difference between Standard and Premium?
faq.a6: Standard is free with limited manual entry. Premium (€4.99/mo) unlocks unlimited OCR, exportable certified log, full TCO, eco-driving analysis, and tax-ready expense export.

cta.title: Ready to take the wheel of your car finances?
cta.subtitle: 30-day Premium trial. No commitment, no ads.

pricing.title: Pricing as clear as our numbers.
pricing.subtitle: Our revenue comes from a transparent subscription and partner program — never from selling your data.
pricing.vatNote: All prices include VAT. Tax applied per country via Stripe Tax.

cookies.title: Essential cookies only
cookies.description: Velocewealth uses only strictly necessary cookies (session, preferences). No advertising cookies, no third-party tracking.
